articles.title: Apple now makes one in four iPhones in India: report
articles.description: Apple reportedly produced 55 million units in India last year, a shift accelerated as Apple faced growing uncertainty in China.
articles.author: Ivan Mehta

articles.title: Yann LeCun’s AMI Labs raises $1.03 billion to build world models
articles.description: AMI Labs, the new venture cofounded by Turing Prize winner Yann LeCun after he left Meta, has raised $1.03 billion at a $3.5 billion pre-money
articles.author: Anna Heim

articles.title: An iPhone-hacking toolkit used by Russian spies likely came from U.S military contractor
articles.description: Google found a series of hacking tools they said were used by a Russian espionage group and a cybercriminal group in China. Sources from a U.S.
articles.author: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai

articles.title: Electric air taxi maker Archer hits back at Joby in countersuit alleging concealed Chinese ties
articles.description: Archer's countersuit comes four months after Joby sued its rival for alleged 'corporate espionage.'
articles.author: Kirsten Korosec

articles.title: Founders Fund nears $6B close for latest growth fund, sources say
articles.description: The fresh fundraise comes less than a year after Founders Fund closed its third growth fund, a $4.6 billion vehicle intended primarily for follow-on
articles.author: Marina Temkin
